smells.name: No output format specified
smells.signal: the prompt asks for output but does not state length, structure, or format

smells.name: Monolithic mixed-concerns prompt
smells.signal: one prompt instructs multiple distinct tasks (classify + summarize + translate)

smells.name: Duplicated instructions
smells.signal: the same instruction is restated in multiple places

smells.name: Hardcoded magic values
smells.signal: hardcoded numbers/strings that should be parameters

smells.name: Missing internal section delimiters
smells.signal: no clear boundaries between system instructions, examples, output spec

smells.name: Forced answer encourages fabrication
smells.signal: prompt requires an answer regardless of evidence

smells.name: Ungrounded factual task
smells.signal: factual task with no source, retrieval, or grounding context

smells.name: Ambiguous instruction
smells.signal: key task term or output expectation is vague

smells.name: Contradictory instructions
smells.signal: two parts conflict (e.g., "be concise" + "include all details")

smells.name: Underspecified task
smells.signal: essential parameters missing

smells.name: Brittle phrasing reliance
smells.signal: branches on exact phrasing without handling variants

smells.name: Unhandled empty/edge input
smells.signal: assumes non-empty or well-formed input

smells.name: Single edge-case exemplar
smells.signal: only few-shot is an unusual case

smells.name: Missing examples for non-standard task
smells.signal: unusual task presented zero-shot

smells.name: Irrelevant context inflation
smells.signal: large context not needed for the task

smells.name: Oversized few-shot set
smells.signal: many more examples than required

smells.name: Uncached static context
smells.signal: large unchanging context resent on every call

smells.name: Filler verbosity
smells.signal: politeness/meta phrases that add tokens without effect

smells.name: Redundant default-behavior instructions
smells.signal: instructions repeating default behavior

smells.name: Unsanitized user-input concatenation
smells.signal: user input interpolated directly without sanitization

smells.name: Missing instruction/data delimiting
smells.signal: user content not separated from instructions

smells.name: Instruction-override exposure
smells.signal: prompt grants user instructions priority

smells.name: Embedded secret
smells.signal: API key, credential, internal URL, or token in prompt text

smells.name: Embedded PII
smells.signal: personally identifiable info in prompt text or examples

smells.name: Over-trusted model output
smells.signal: code uses model output (SQL, code, URLs) without validation

smells.name: Missing refusal guardrails
smells.signal: domain needs refusal/escalation but none specified

smells.name: Jailbreak-susceptible framing
smells.signal: phrases broadly suppressing safety

smells.name: Absent content boundaries
smells.signal: consumer-facing deployment without scope limits

smells.name: No escalation path for sensitive content
smells.signal: no redirect for self-harm/violence content where invited
